name: io.github.lucav21/heu-mcp
description: HEU Legal e-signature MCP: manage HEU documents and PDFs, prompt signers, download PDFs.

environmentVariables.name: HEU_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: HEU Legal API key (Profile > API Keys, Enterprise plan required)

environmentVariables.name: HEU_DOWNLOAD_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where downloaded PDFs are saved. Default: /tmp
